title: Proton beam cannon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:PiettProtonBeamCannon.jpg|thumb|right|230px|[[Firmus Piett/Legends|Piett's]] [[Emancipator|''Accuser'']] fires its proton beam cannon at a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Cruiser]].]]

'''Proton beam cannons''' were powerful energy weapons used most prominently by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
They were able to deal massive amount of damage to hulls.

==History==
[[File:LancetProtonBeamCannon.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lancet Aerial Artillery|Lancets]] attack a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Mobile Proton Torpedo Launcher-2a|MPTL-2a]] with their proton beam cannons.]]

The most famous of these were the planetary proton beam cannons used to make up [[Concave Dish Composite Beam Superlaser|superlasers]] such as the ones found on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first]] and [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Stars]].<ref name="DSD">''[[Death Star Designer]]''</ref> These could completely obliterate a target world.<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>

There also existed smaller [[Composite Beam Superlaser|composite beam superlasers]] that were capable of making a planet uninhabitable by destroying its core.<ref name="DSD" /> An anti-capital ship proton beam cannon was also constructed on the surface of [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="RSIII">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''</ref> Capital ship-scaled cannons were a feature of both the [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|''Eclipse''-class]] and [[Sovereign-class Super Star Destroyer|''Sovereign''-class Super Star Destroyer]] models. These guns could sear entire continents in a moment, but not pulverize an entire planet.<ref name="DESB">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>

At the Empire's height, a much smaller proton beam cannon was mounted on the modified [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], the [[Emancipator|''Accuser'']].<ref name="EAW">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''</ref> Decades later, [[Booster Terrik]] had his private [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' fitted with a similar weapon said to be based on the [[Darksaber (superweapon)|Darksaber]] project.<ref name="NJOSB">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref> A fighter-scale proton beam cannon was fitted to the [[Lancet Aerial Artillery]] vehicles used by the Empire.<ref name="EAWFOC">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>
